title: Country Music Legends Take the Stage
story: Guitars twanged and voices harmonized as the Carter Family made their Grand Ole Opry debut in 1950. Joined by guitar wizard Chet Atkins, they brought their unique Appalachian sound to Nashville's famous stage on May 29. The performance marked a milestone for country music, blending traditional tunes with Atkins' innovative fingerpicking style.
activity_question: Who joined the Carter Family for their Grand Ole Opry debut?
bonus_fact: The Grand Ole Opry is the longest-running radio show in US history, starting in 1925.

title: Johnny Cash's Quirky Car Song Revs Up
story: Vroom! Johnny Cash's hilarious song about building a car 'One Piece At A Time' zoomed up the charts in 1976. Released on May 29, this catchy tune told the story of an auto worker sneaking parts out of the factory to build his dream car. The song's clever lyrics and Cash's deep voice made it a hit, cruising to number 29 on the charts.
activity_question: What was the title of Johnny Cash's song about building a car?
follow_up_question: Why do you think people found this song funny?

title: Clarence Carter's Soulful Courtroom Hit
story: Soul singer Clarence Carter had music fans grooving in 1971. His funky tune 'Court Room' climbed the charts, reaching number 61 on May 29. Carter's smooth voice and catchy rhythm made the song a hit. It told a story of love and heartbreak, set in an unusual place - a courtroom!
activity_question: What was the name of Clarence Carter's hit song?
bonus_fact: Clarence Carter is known for his powerful, soulful voice and guitar skills.

title: Pop and Opera Unite in Ibiza
story: Worlds collided in 1987 when rock legend Freddie Mercury teamed up with opera star Montserrat Caballé. Their powerful voices blended on May 29 as they unveiled Barcelona at the Ibiza Fest. This unique duet bridged musical genres, showcasing Mercurys soaring range alongside Caballés operatic prowess. The song later became an anthem for the 1992 Olympics.
activity_question: What event did Freddie Mercury and Montserrat Caballé perform at?
follow_up_question: Can you name another famous duet between singers from different musical styles?

title: Harmony Hits the Airwaves
story: Three voices blended into musical magic in 1969. On May 29, Crosby, Stills & Nash released their first album together. It was packed with catchy tunes that got people singing along. Two songs became instant favorites: 'Marrakesh Express' and 'Suite: Judy Blue Eyes'. The album's mix of folk and rock created a fresh sound that captured listeners' hearts.
activity_question: What were the two hit songs mentioned from the Crosby, Stills & Nash album?
bonus_fact: The band's name comes from the last names of its three members: David Crosby, Stephen Stills, and Graham Nash.
